text.title: AI Post-Mortem Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-post-mortem-template methodology end-to-end.

step.name: freeze-incident-timeline
step.action: Pin timestamps from detect → mitigate → resolve.

step.name: identify-prompt-and-model-versions
step.action: Lock prompt SHA + model ID + retrieval index ID at moment of incident.
step.decision-gate: If versions cannot be reconstructed, the incident is also a versioning-discipline issue — flag in action items.

step.name: walk-ai-five-whys
step.action: Apply hallucination / drift / refusal / context branches in the five-whys analysis.

step.name: draft-action-items
step.action: Concrete actions with owners + due dates + verification step. Cap at 5.
step.decision-gate: Action items > 5 means scope is too wide; split into linked post-mortems.

step.name: publish-and-track
step.action: Publish to post-mortem registry; track action items in tracker.
